Terms & Conditions

Valid in Marks & Spencer stores in the UK and Channel Islands (excluding BP Connect stores and Applegreen stores) and online at marksandspencer.com. These locations may be extended at our discretion. Vouchers may only be redeemed against Marks & Spencer products and services except Marks & Spencer gift cards, Travel Money or cash advances. Vouchers cannot be redeemed against M&S Bank products. We reserve the right to substitute or remove product ranges / services / offers available for redemption at any time. One or many vouchers can be redeemed in a single transaction and must be surrendered upon redemption. Each voucher can only be redeemed once either in store or online. No change will be given against vouchers. Purchases paid in for in part using M&S reward vouchers do not qualify for bonus points, except when the spend on the M&S Card exceeds any applicable bonus offer threshold spend. Marks & Spencer cannot be held responsible for vouchers once they have left its control. Marks & Spencer reserves the right to reject this voucher with reasonable cause. Only original vouchers can be accepted. This voucher is issued under the terms and conditions of the M&S Loyalty Scheme.

General terms and conditions: The issue of M&S reward vouchers is subject to a minimum number of points being collected. Reward vouchers are always issued in whole £ denominations. Full details can be found in the M&S Loyalty Scheme terms and conditions. The M&S Loyalty Scheme is promoted and operated by Marks and Spencer plc. The reproduction of colours is as accurate as photographic and printing processes will allow. All correspondence to be addressed to Customer Services department (Loyalty Queries), Kings Meadow, Chester CH99 9FU. Marks and Spencer plc. Registered Office: Waterside House, 35 North Wharf Road, London W2 1NW. Registered number: 214436 (England and Wales). ©Marks and Spencer plc. Marks & Spencer and Your M&S are registered trademarks of Marks and Spencer plc and are used under license.

App Download

To redeem your Rewards in store, you'll need the  M&S app
